column1: Nico Hoerner leads the pack tonight, setting the table atop the Phillies lineup with a steady bat and a strong 71.4% hit probability against Cristopher Sanchez—plus the platoon advantage is firmly in his corner. Right behind, Bo Bichette brings his reliable profile to Dodger blue, batting second and facing a hittable lefty in Justin Wrobleski, making his own 70.9% hit probability tough to ignore. Brandon Nimmo and Roman Anthony also offer top-of-order roles with favorable matchups, but Hoerner and Bichette stand out as the sharpest plays for Beat The Streak hunters.
